findings.description: Section s1 contains a related-handlers table that references PascalCase class names HttpResponseHandler, ThreadContextHandler, and NablarchTagHandler, but none of these appear in the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source 概要 section: 関連するハンドラ table lists ':doc:`HttpResponseHandler`', ':doc:`ThreadContextHandler`', ':doc:`NablarchTagHandler`' with placement constraints.
